context: [newsapi | 2026-07-01] Weekly security roundup: RivalBank disclosed a breach of 500,000 customer records; CloudNine was hit by ransomware and took systems offline; Vertex Pay attended the industry summit as a sponsor.
[nvd | 2026-06-20] CVE-2026-40210: remote code execution in Halcyon Logistics Router firmware, CVSS 9.0. Halcyon Logistics is a separate company; the advisory does not mention Halcyon Bank.

[newsapi | 2026-07-02] Industry roundup: ApexFin raised $300M in new funding; ZenPay was valued at $5B; Quill Health confirmed a data breach exposing patient records; BrightCRM launched a new product.
[nvd | 2026-06-15] CVE-2026-30012: reflected XSS in PebbleDesk Admin Console, CVSS 3.1. Requires an authenticated admin session and user interaction.

[newsapi | 2026-06-28] Sable Insurance's larger rival, Onyx Assurance, disclosed a breach of 2 million policyholder records. [nvd | 2026-06-10] CVE-2026-31555: authentication bypass in Sable Insurance Portal, CVSS 8.7.
[newsapi | 2026-07-05] A dark-web forum post claims Tundra Logistics data is for sale. Tundra says it has 'seen no evidence' of a breach and is investigating.
[newsapi | 2026-06-30] Cirrus Apps publishes a blog post titled 'Why zero-trust matters' and announces an upcoming security webinar.
[newsapi | 2026-07-03] Meadow Bank confirms a security incident affecting customer accounts. It has not disclosed how many accounts or what data was involved.
[nvd | 2026-06-22] CVE-2026-32001: SSRF in Flint Retail Checkout, CVSS 8.2. [nvd | 2026-06-25] CVE-2026-32099: RCE in Granite Retail POS, CVSS 9.5. Granite Retail is unaffiliated with Flint Retail.
[newsapi | 2019-04-10] Wren Softworks disclosed a breach in 2019 exposing 40,000 customer records. [newsapi | 2026-07-01] Unrelated firm Cobalt Labs closed a $150M funding round.
